title: Scaffold mcp/server.ts — MCP server skeleton with 8 tool schemas
implementation_notes: Use the @modelcontextprotocol/sdk package. Check if it is installed: grep @modelcontextprotocol app/package.json
If not installed: add to app/package.json dependencies and run bun install in app/.

Alternatively, implement a minimal stdio MCP server from scratch using Bun.stdin/stdout with the JSON-RPC protocol — this avoids a new dependency. See https://modelcontextprotocol.io/llms-full.txt for the protocol spec.
Recommended: minimal stdio approach (no new npm dependency).
The 8 tools to register (name + description + input_schema):
1. relayhq_get_context — no inputs — returns workspace summary
2. relayhq_list_tasks — input: { assignee?: string } — returns task list
3. relayhq_get_bootstrap — input: { taskId: string } — returns execution pack
4. relayhq_claim_task — input: { taskId: string, agentId: string } — claims task
5. relayhq_heartbeat — input: { taskId: string, agentId: string } — refreshes lock
6. relayhq_update_task — input: { taskId: string, agentId: string, status?: string, progress?: number, result?: string, executionNotes?: string } — patches task
7. relayhq_request_approval — input: { taskId: string, agentId: string, reason: string } — requests approval
8. relayhq_create_tasks — input: { tasks: TaskProposal[] } — bulk create
In this subtask: just define the tool schemas and stub handlers that return { content: [{ type: 'text', text: 'Not yet implemented' }] }.
The actual HTTP delegation is subtask_02.
The BASE_URL is read from RELAYHQ_BASE_URL env var or defaults to http://127.0.0.1:4310.
Server reads from stdin, writes to stdout (MCP stdio transport).
acceptance_criteria: mcp/server.ts exists and compiles (bun run mcp/server.ts starts without error).
8 tools are registered with correct names and input schemas.
Server responds to tools/list with all 8 tools.
Stub handlers return 'Not yet implemented' without crashing.
completion_summary: Created mcp/server.ts with a minimal stdio MCP server skeleton and all eight RelayHQ tool schemas registered.
